/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/common/logging.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/common/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/core/correlation.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/core/database.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/core/findings.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/core/scoring.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/parser/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/parser/cppcheck_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/parser/flawfinder_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/parser/gcc_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/parser/coverity_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/runner/runner.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/runner/cppcheck.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/runner/flawfinder.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/runner/gcc.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/runner/coverity.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/report/report.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/report/json.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/tool_finder.c.o CMakeFiles/analyzer.dir/src/main.c.o -o analyzer
